title: Superconducting Qubit Fabrication
description: Understand the nanofabrication processes used to create superconducting qubits - from substrate preparation to Josephson junction formation. Learn about materials, lithography, and the impact of fabrication on qubit performance.
learningObjectives: Describe the key steps in superconducting qubit fabrication
Explain the Dolan bridge technique for Josephson junction formation
Understand how materials choices affect qubit coherence
Analyze the relationship between fabrication parameters and qubit properties
Identify common fabrication challenges and solutions
